summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Report Builder (Faz 4) feature. Backend APIs 100% functional with 18 tests passed. Frontend fully working with all data sources, column selection, report generation, export, and template features operational.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) hit during rapid test execution - not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: Report Builder implementation is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All 6 data sources correctly defined with appropriate columns and types
Proper date field handling for different collections
Good error handling with HTTPException for validation errors
MongoDB ObjectId correctly excluded from projections
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - uses existing tenant data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Report Builder feature fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_report_builder.py cover config endpoint, report generation with filters, Excel/PDF export, and template CRUD. Frontend tested via Playwright for all user flows. All navigation routes (/reports/builder, /app/rapor-olusturucu) working.
passed_tests: Report Builder config endpoint returns 6 data sources: reservations, revenue, guests, rooms, housekeeping, folios
Each data source has properly defined columns with labels and types
Report generation with selected columns works correctly
Date range filtering (last 30, last 90, ytd) works
Advanced filters with operators (eq, ne, gt, contains) work
Summary statistics calculated for numeric/currency columns
Excel export downloads .xlsx file with proper content-type
PDF export downloads .pdf file with proper content-type
Template listing works
Template save creates new template
Template save persists and appears in list
Template delete removes template
Delete non-existent template returns 404
Authentication required for all endpoints
Frontend Report Builder page loads at /reports/builder
Frontend /app/rapor-olusturucu route works
Data source selection shows available columns
Column selection allows multi-select
Date presets apply correct ranges
Generate report button creates results table
Report Builder accessible from Reports page tabs
Report Builder accessible from BasicReports sidebar link
Report Builder visible in main navigation
